## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client sprints and handoffs before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Brex publishing is blocked** by a client security review for Sanity access, preventing publication of 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Turnstile’s calibration article** is a lower-risk topic to gather voice/tone feedback without overwhelming the client with a complex "category-defining" topic.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Read AI is pivoting** from "co-pilot" to "AI assistant" and wants to de-emphasize Slack in favor of Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Kavishka is transitioning** from sprints to the Check That project, leaving a legacy of process automation that cut editing time from 90 to 20 minutes for Hex/Redis.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

## Topics

### Team & Process Updates

  - [**Kavishka's Transition:** Moving from sprints to the Check That project.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [**Legacy:** Developed repeatable process fixes (e.g., for Hex/Redis) that cut editing time from 90 to 20 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Task Management:** Client-provided documents must be marked "in progress" in Notion to notify Hassan to begin work.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This prevents delays, as seen with BlackSoul, where documents were missed.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### Client Sprint Updates

#### BlackSoul

  - [**Next Sync:** Jan 2 (Week 3).](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Deliverable:** Content calendar for the Jan 2 sync.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Aida will prep materials and record a Content OS demo video.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Kathy will lead the presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Handoff:** Kathy will lead today's Week 2 check-in.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

#### Turnstile

  - [**Calibration Article:** A lower-risk topic is being used to gather voice/tone feedback without overwhelming the client with a complex "category-defining" article.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Calibration article due from Tamara by Monday noon (CET).](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Content OS build-out by Aida on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Sync Schedule:** Sync next Tuesday → skip the following week → sync the week after.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

#### Brex

  - [**Publishing Blocker:** A client security review for Sanity access is preventing publication of 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Status:** The client confirmed a team member will contact Aida/George about access.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Pipeline:** Nathalie is improving the pipeline to support the 10-article output.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [**Images:** A Linear ticket will be filed for Katya to create images based on the client's homepage and Bubble examples.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

#### Ramp

  - [**Publishing Process:** Articles are published first, then shared with the client for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The client's new site allows for easy unpublishing if changes are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Assignment Prioritization:** The shared list is for client awareness, not a pre-approval step.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

#### Read AI

  - [**Key Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Product:** Pivot from "co-pilot" to "AI assistant."](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [**Integrations:** De-emphasize Slack; focus on Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Aida to publish 5 articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [Aida to send topics for the week of Dec 29 by Monday morning.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

  - [**Feedback:** Client to finalize comments on last week's articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

      - [Aida to deliver the business-like prioritization framework.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

#### Hex

  - [**Personnel Change:** Jessica (client-side reviewer) is leaving at the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [**Impact:** Minimal, as content quality has significantly improved.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

#### Other Clients

  - [**Krasta:** Calibration article is published; 2 more articles are ready.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**VizCom:** 5 articles are in progress; none are published yet, pending the client's new website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/cXM_WMh6CqY2kSQyaDGHnGsExR_6AdaL?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
